## Meeting Purpose

[Realign on content strategy and processes for Exec's GrowthX-powered blog](https://fathom.video/share/MsakEypZsLqv2X8tQwmnqq_vFisEzyir?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Exec team feels current content isn't accurately representing product/company; agreed to "re-onboard" and refine strategy](https://fathom.video/share/MsakEypZsLqv2X8tQwmnqq_vFisEzyir?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Clarified distinction between Exec's two product lines (coaching platform vs. role-play platform) for more targeted content](https://fathom.video/share/MsakEypZsLqv2X8tQwmnqq_vFisEzyir?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Discussed balancing programmatic SEO with editorial content, aiming for both human and LLM search optimization](https://fathom.video/share/MsakEypZsLqv2X8tQwmnqq_vFisEzyir?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Reviewed GrowthX's AI-powered content creation process and analytics tracking in detail](https://fathom.video/share/MsakEypZsLqv2X8tQwmnqq_vFisEzyir?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Reset

  - [Agreed to revisit strategy due to Exec team changes and product evolution since January](https://fathom.video/share/MsakEypZsLqv2X8tQwmnqq_vFisEzyir?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Plan to update audience personas, company context, and writing guidelines in GrowthX's Atlas platform](https://fathom.video/share/MsakEypZsLqv2X8tQwmnqq_vFisEzyir?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Focus on differentiating between Exec's coaching platform (L\&D-focused) and role-play platform (sales, support) in content](https://fathom.video/share/MsakEypZsLqv2X8tQwmnqq_vFisEzyir?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)

### SEO Approach

  - [Balancing programmatic SEO for long-tail keywords with editorial content for primary keywords](https://fathom.video/share/MsakEypZsLqv2X8tQwmnqq_vFisEzyir?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Aim: Create authoritative guides (e.g., comprehensive sales role-play guide) while maintaining long-tail content](https://fathom.video/share/MsakEypZsLqv2X8tQwmnqq_vFisEzyir?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Clarified "role play" should be two words in prose, one word "roleplay" for product name](https://fathom.video/share/MsakEypZsLqv2X8tQwmnqq_vFisEzyir?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)

### Content Performance

  - [Seeing first real inbound from SEO, including booked demos](https://fathom.video/share/MsakEypZsLqv2X8tQwmnqq_vFisEzyir?tab=summary&timestamp=59.0)
  - [Current stats: \~67 average daily clicks, peak days hitting 84 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/MsakEypZsLqv2X8tQwmnqq_vFisEzyir?tab=summary&timestamp=2125.0)
  - [Goal: Reach 100 clicks per day (3/7 days currently hitting 70+ clicks)](https://fathom.video/share/MsakEypZsLqv2X8tQwmnqq_vFisEzyir?tab=summary&timestamp=2125.0)
  - [LLM referral traffic on track to meet/surpass previous months](https://fathom.video/share/MsakEypZsLqv2X8tQwmnqq_vFisEzyir?tab=summary&timestamp=2174.0)

### GrowthX Content Creation Process

  - [Detailed walkthrough of AI-powered workflow from Airtable assignment to published post](https://fathom.video/share/MsakEypZsLqv2X8tQwmnqq_vFisEzyir?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Human oversight at key stages (brief, outline) to ensure quality and alignment](https://fathom.video/share/MsakEypZsLqv2X8tQwmnqq_vFisEzyir?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
  - [Fact-checking, internal linking, and meta tag generation included in process](https://fathom.video/share/MsakEypZsLqv2X8tQwmnqq_vFisEzyir?tab=summary&timestamp=1808.0)

### Analytics and Reporting

  - [Using Looker dashboard for performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/MsakEypZsLqv2X8tQwmnqq_vFisEzyir?tab=summary&timestamp=2013.0)
  - [GSC data shows increasing clicks and impressions week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/MsakEypZsLqv2X8tQwmnqq_vFisEzyir?tab=summary&timestamp=2061.0)
  - [Average position across all Exec pages: 29.4 (slight decline, not concerning)](https://fathom.video/share/MsakEypZsLqv2X8tQwmnqq_vFisEzyir?tab=summary&timestamp=2063.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Garrett to review and mark content assignments as "ready to start" in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/MsakEypZsLqv2X8tQwmnqq_vFisEzyir?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [Schedule deeper dive into Atlas artifacts and strategy refinement next week](https://fathom.video/share/MsakEypZsLqv2X8tQwmnqq_vFisEzyir?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Introduce new team member Joe (SEO/analytics expert) in next week's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/MsakEypZsLqv2X8tQwmnqq_vFisEzyir?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Continue monitoring content performance, with focus on improving keyword rankings](https://fathom.video/share/MsakEypZsLqv2X8tQwmnqq_vFisEzyir?tab=summary&timestamp=2302.0)
